assessment_objectives.objective:
the organization tracks AI models and AI agents deployed in development environments that captures:
(1) ownership
(2) intended purpose; and 
(3) status.

the organization tracks AI models and AI agents deployed in production environments that captures:
(1) ownership
(2) intended purpose; and 
(3) status.

the organization tracks AI models and AI agents updates that captures:
(1) ownership
(2) intended purpose; and 
(3) status.

the organization tracks decommissioned AI models and AI agents that captures:
(1) ownership;
(2) intended purpose; and
(3) date of decommissioning.
